headline: Shiba Inu Kabosu Dog Behind The Doge Meme And Dogecoin Turns 16
summary:
Kabosu, the Shiba Inu dog in Japan that inspired the Doge meme, turned 16 this week. 

The Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) dog named Kabosu became famous in 2010 when her owner Atsuko Sato began blogging about the rescue dog.
